entity.summary: Cronos automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with residual current liquidity and preserved protocol identity, but insufficient recent trading evidence for an active classification in this review pass.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies DuckyDeFi as a Cronos AMM DEX and reports current TVL. Recent DEX-volume metrics were not exposed in the reviewed snapshot and a stable first-party website URL was not recovered, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead.

evidence.title: DuckyDeFi project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration.

evidence.title: DuckyDeFi TVL and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies DuckyDeFi as a Cronos AMM DEX and reports residual current TVL, supporting conservative limited classification.

evidence.title: DuckyDeFi protocol adapter reference
evidence.notes: Open-source protocol adapter repository provides the implementation basis for the DuckyDeFi TVL series used for identity and status corroboration.
